search.query: | fields level_1 | dedup level_1 | where level_1!="0" | sort + level_1
| search level_1=$datacenter|s$ | fields level_2 | dedup level_2 | where level_2!="0" | sort + level_2
| search level_1=$datacenter|s$ | fields level_2 | dedup level_2 | where level_2!="0" AND level_2!=$zone_1|s$ | sort + level_2
| inputlookup my_subnets_lookup | fillnull | where level_1 != "*" | stats count by level_1 level_2

`netflow_search_rule_20067` nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" $advanced_filter$ (src_ip="$src_ip$" OR src_host="$src_ip$") (dest_ip="$dest_ip$" OR dest_host="$dest_ip$") src_port="$src_port$" dest_port="$dest_port$" | lookup `is_local_lookup` my_subnets_lookup subnet AS src_ip OUTPUT level_2 AS src_group level_1 as src_datacenter | lookup `is_local_lookup` my_subnets_lookup subnet AS dest_ip OUTPUT level_2 AS dest_group level_1 as dest_datacenter | search (src_group=$zone_1$ OR dest_group=$zone_1$) AND (src_group=$zone_2$ OR dest_group=$zone_2$) AND (src_datacenter=$datacenter|s$ OR dest_datacenter=$datacenter|s$) | where src_group != dest_group | `dedup_timechart_events` | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" | fillnull value="" transport | search transport="$protocol_name$" | `sampling(bytes_in)` | eval src_ip=src_group+" to "+dest_group | `per_second_chart(sum(bytes_in) by src_ip,"$span_token$",$span_int$)`

`netflow_search_rule_20067` nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" $advanced_filter$ (src_ip="$src_ip$" OR src_host="$src_ip$") (dest_ip="$dest_ip$" OR dest_host="$dest_ip$") src_port="$src_port$" dest_port="$dest_port$" | lookup `is_local_lookup` my_subnets_lookup subnet AS src_ip OUTPUT level_2 AS src_group level_1 as src_datacenter | lookup `is_local_lookup` my_subnets_lookup subnet AS dest_ip OUTPUT level_2 AS dest_group level_1 as dest_datacenter | search (src_group=$zone_1$ OR dest_group=$zone_1$) AND (src_group=$zone_2$ OR dest_group=$zone_2$) AND (src_datacenter=$datacenter|s$ OR dest_datacenter=$datacenter|s$) | where src_group != dest_group | `dedup_timechart_events` | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" | fillnull value="" transport | search transport="$protocol_name$" | `sampling(bytes_in)` | `sampling(packets_in)` | `sampling(flow_count)` | bin $span_token$ _time | eval src_ip=src_group+" to "+dest_group | stats sum(bytes_in) as sumbytes sum(packets_in) as sumpacketsin sum(flow_count) as sumflowcount by src_ip _time | eval avgbits=sumbytes*8/($span_int$) | eval avgconnections=sumflowcount/($span_int$) | stats sum(sumbytes) as TrafficAmount sparkline(sum(sumbytes)) as TrafficLine sum(sumpacketsin) as PacketsAmount sum(sumflowcount) as Connections max(avgbits) as MaxTraffic perc95(avgbits) as P95Traffic max(avgconnections) as MaxConnections perc95(avgconnections) as P95Connections by src_ip | eventstats sum(TrafficAmount) as TotalTraffic | sort 0 - P95Traffic | eval P95Traffic=P95Traffic/1000000 | eval AverageSpeed=(TrafficAmount)*8/$range$ | eval PacketsSpeed=(PacketsAmount)/$range$ | eval ConnectionSpeed=(Connections)/$range$ | eval pct = round(TrafficAmount/TotalTraffic*100,2) | `commas_formatting(P95Traffic, P95Traffic, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Average Connections/s,ConnectionSpeed,0)` | `commas_formatting(Max Connections/s,MaxConnections,0)` | `commas_formatting(95th Connections/s,P95Connections,0)` | `default_preparation_for_comma_formatted_table` | table src_ip P95Traffic "Max Mbps" "Average Mbps" "Total Traffic MB" pct TrafficLine "Average Packets/s" "Total Packets" "95th Connections/s" "Max Connections/s" "Average Connections/s" "Total Connections" | rename src_ip as "Subnet Group to Subnet Group" | rename P95Traffic as "95th Mbps" | rename TrafficLine as "Traffic Line" | rename pct as "% of Total"

drilldown.eval: mvindex(split($row.Subnet Group to Subnet Group$, " to "),0)
mvindex(split($row.Subnet Group to Subnet Group$, " to "),1)

table.title: Traffic for Data Center $datacenter$ between $selected_src_group$ and $selected_dest_group$

search.query: `netflow_search_rule_20067` nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" $advanced_filter$ (src_ip="$src_ip$" OR src_host="$src_ip$") (dest_ip="$dest_ip$" OR dest_host="$dest_ip$") src_port="$src_port$" dest_port="$dest_port$" | eventstats sum(bytes_in) as sum_by_exp by exp_ip nfo_hostname | lookup `is_local_lookup` my_subnets_lookup subnet AS src_ip OUTPUT level_2 AS src_group level_1 as src_datacenter | lookup `is_local_lookup` my_subnets_lookup subnet AS dest_ip OUTPUT level_2 AS dest_group level_1 as dest_datacenter | search src_group=$selected_src_group$ dest_group=$selected_dest_group$ (src_datacenter=$datacenter|s$ OR dest_datacenter=$datacenter|s$) | where src_group != dest_group | `dedup_timechart_events` | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" | fillnull value="" transport | search transport="$protocol_name$" | `sampling(bytes_in)` | `sampling(packets_in)` | `sampling(flow_count)` | bin $span_token$ _time | `conversation(TrafficAmount,"$span_token$",$span_int$,$range$)`

html.p: You see this message because there is no data for the selected Time Range or the App Setup is not completed.

This dashboard is populated by NetFlow Optimizer (NFO) Logic Module “10067: Top Traffic Monitor” (syslogs with nfc_id=20067). This Module identifies hosts with the most traffic. It consolidates NetFlow records over a period of time (Data Collection Interval) which all have the same combination of the following fields: Source IP address, Destination IP address, Source port number, Destination port number, Layer 3 protocol, Input interface, Output interface. This Module is packaged in NFO “Network Traffic and Devices Monitor” Module Set.
Please either change the Time Range or make sure that this NFO Logic Module is enabled. See NSO Configuration for more details.
You see this message because there is no data for the my-subnets.csv lookup file.

This dashboard is using this lookup $SPLUNK_HOME/etc/apps/netflow/lookups/my-subnets.csv file to determine traffic in and out of your datacenter as well as other subnet based statistics. It supports up to four-level hierarchy, and should be created in the following format.

Example:
subnet level_1 level_2 level_3 level_4 description
10.0.5.0/29 ClassA ClassA1 ClassA11 ClassA111 ClassAsubnet111
10.0.5.8/29 ClassA ClassA1 ClassA11 ClassA112 ClassAsubnet112
10.0.5.16/28 ClassA ClassA1 ClassA12 ClassA121 ClassAsubnet121
10.0.5.32/27 ClassA ClassA1 ClassA12 ClassA122 ClassAsubnet122
10.0.5.64/26 ClassA ClassA2 ClassA21 ClassA211 ClassAsubnet211
10.0.5.128/27 ClassA ClassA2 ClassA21 ClassA212 ClassAsubnet212
10.0.5.160/27 ClassA ClassA2 ClassA22 ClassA221 ClassAsubnet221
10.0.5.192/26 ClassA ClassA2 ClassA22 ClassA222 ClassAsubnet222
172.16.0.0/12 ClassB ClassB1 ClassB11 ClassB111 ClassBsubnet111
192.168.0.0/16 ClassC ClassC1 ClassC11 ClassC111 ClassCsubnet111
100::/18 IPv6_1 IPv6_11 IPv6_111 IPv6_1111 IPv6_1_subnet
104::/18 IPv6_2 IPv6_21 IPv6_211 IPv6_2111 IPv6_2_subnet
108::/18 IPv6_3 IPv6_31 IPv6_311 IPv6_3111 IPv6_3_subnet
10c::/18 IPv6_4 IPv6_41 IPv6_411 IPv6_4111 IPv6_4_subnet
